meaning: n.生产者,制作者,演出人,(电影)制片人
examples: Libya is a major oil producer.
In June, producer prices slipped 0.1% from May.
Brazil is the world's largest producer of coffee.
The battle for control of Australian gold producer Normandy appears to be nearing the end.
There are also shops selling local foodstuffs, including the beverages of local cider producer Pedneault.
